params_used.custom_text: // This module processes a 48-bit mantissa input (mo) and an 8-bit exponent input (eo) to produce a 23-bit mantissa output (mout) and an 8-bit exponent output (eout). When the enable signal (EN) is active, if the most significant bit of the mantissa (mo[47]) is set to 1, the output exponent (eout) is decremented by one and the mantissa output (mout) is derived from bits [46:24] of the input. If the most significant bit is 0, the exponent remains unchanged and the mantissa output is taken from bits [45:23]. When EN is not active, the exponent output is reset to zero, and the mantissa output is assigned the least significant 23 bits of mo.
